app.title: Rezeptor — v{version}
app.footer_update_tip: Click to open the update dialog
app.home_tagline: Tested Windows recipes for Linux · Proton-GE
app.home_intro: Welcome. Pick a recipe on the left to install, validate, or launch. Rezeptor uses Proton-GE only — no system Wine fallbacks.
app.home_tip: Tip: F5 refreshes status for all recipes. Help opens the handbook.
app.home_link_wiki_tip: Open the public documentation in your browser

menu.refresh_tip: Refresh install status of all recipes via validate.sh (also runs after install/repair and on startup).
menu.reorder_same_category: Reorder only within the same category (e.g. both under Games)
menu.reorder_need_siblings: Only one recipe in this category — nothing to move
menu.new_recipe_tip: Create a local recipe folder from the template (new-recipe.sh)
menu.source_tip: Set folder, installer, or archive for installation
menu.edit_recipe_tip: Edit and save the recipe (updates the manifest)
menu.add_recipe_catalog_tip: Add a recipe from the catalog or a URL
menu.system_check_tip: Check host tools for Rezeptor and install missing packages

tooltip.install: First-time install of the selected recipe (choose source/target first if none set)
tooltip.cancel_install: Cancel the running install and roll back what was created
tooltip.repair: Check for gaps and restore missing pieces
tooltip.kill: Quit running Wine/app processes for this recipe
tooltip.more: More actions — including Validate, Add or update shortcuts, Uninstall
tooltip.runtime_proton: Rezeptor launches with bundled Proton-GE (own Wine prefix under the data folder).
tooltip.runtime_proton_steam: Rezeptor Proton-GE (priority). Steam compatdata stays for online-fix / Spacewar — no Rezeptor prefix.
tooltip.runtime_steam: Launches via Steam Proton (compatdata) — no Rezeptor prefix. Typical for Steam games.
tooltip.runtime_system: Launches with host/system Wine (not bundled Proton-GE).
tooltip.open_data_root: Open install data (Wine prefix / files stored for this recipe)
tooltip.open_data_root_missing: No install data yet — available after Install
tooltip.regen_manifest: Approve changed recipe files as trusted

state.untrusted_tip: Recipe files changed — use More → “Approve files” (developer mode / REZEPTOR_DEV)

status.installed_wiso: Installed — “Launch” or “Repair”; portable path under More ▾
status.gpu_experiment: GPU experiment active — Launch possible; on failure: scripts/photoshop-gpu-profile.sh stable
status.window_soon: Window appears in a few seconds…
status.install_rolled_back: Installation cancelled — recipe data that was created has been rolled back.
status.install_rollback_fail:
Installation cancelled, but rollback was incomplete.
Please use More → Uninstall to clean up.

trust.title: Check Rezeptor files
trust.reason_changed: Some Rezeptor files changed and need to be approved again.
trust.reason_missing: Expected Rezeptor files are missing or unreadable.
trust.hint_dev: Click “Approve files” to accept the local changes — then you can launch again.
trust.hint_user: Please update Rezeptor (Help → Check for updates), then reopen.

update.none_body: Version v{current} is up to date{latest_hint}.

settings.title: Settings
settings.validate_startup_tip: On: after start, a prompt runs validate.sh for all recipes. Off: quick status only; use “Refresh status” or F5 anytime.
settings.startup_check_body:
Rezeptor will verify the install status of all recipes (validate.sh).
This can take a few seconds — progress appears under “Process”.
settings.startup_check_skip_next: Don’t check automatically on next start
settings.saved: Settings saved — logs: {days} days, max. {files} files
settings.developer_mode_tip: On: Rezeptor menu → “Edit recipe…”, save source; can approve manifest. Same as REZEPTOR_DEV=1.
settings.developer_mode_ready: Developer mode on — More → “Edit recipe…” (Source tab).
settings.archive_passwords_hint: One line = one password, top to bottom. Comments with #. If the right one is missing at install, Rezeptor asks and saves it here.
settings.archive_passwords_ph:
List empty — type here, e.g.:
secret123
other-password
# lines starting with # are comments
settings.archive_passwords_count_empty: 0 passwords — list empty (gray hint text is only an example)
settings.archive_passwords_dirty: List can be cleaned (blank lines, duplicates, tabs…) — use “Clean up” or auto on save.
settings.archive_passwords_fix_tip: Remove blanks/duplicates, clean tabs and control chars; drop invalid lines
settings.pw_err_null: Line {line}: contains null bytes — remove them
settings.retention_tip: Delete older log files after this many days
settings.max_files_tip: Maximum number of stored log files (oldest removed first)

recipe_view.title: Recipe — {name}
recipe_view.dev_banner: Developer mode: saving updates the manifest. Use “Approve files” if trust warns.
recipe_view.readonly_hint: View only — enable Developer mode in Settings, then More → Edit recipe (or REZEPTOR_DEV=1).
recipe_view.readonly_packaged: This recipe is read-only (e.g. AppImage). Saving is disabled.
recipe_view.discard_body: Discard changes and open another file?
recipe_view.save_ok: Saved. Manifest updated — use “Approve files” if trust warns.

dialog.about_body:
Tested Wine recipes — Install, Launch, Validate, Repair.

Project: github.com/{repo}

License: GPL-2.0

Copyright © 2024–2026 Sunny C.
dialog.quit_busy_body: An operation is still running. Quit Rezeptor anyway?
dialog.quit_windows_body: Other Rezeptor windows are still open. Quit Rezeptor anyway?
dialog.quit_dirty_extra: Unsaved changes in secondary windows will be lost.
dialog.version_help:
Recipes guarantee install and launch only with the stated, tested version.

• Tested version: verified by the recipe author
• Custom/other versions: may work, but are untested and unsupported
• Issues with other versions come from the version choice, not the recipe

Use the version documented by the recipe for a guaranteed install.
dialog.wine_dialogs_body:
Wine windows may appear during install or repair.

Rezeptor shows in the step which window is meant:

• “Wine Mono installer” → click Install (do not Cancel)
• “Updating Wine configuration” → click OK or wait briefly

The current action is shown under Steps and in the progress line.
dialog.wine_dialogs_activity: Wine windows may appear briefly — please click OK or Install.
dialog.failure_info: See log files. Issues can be reported on GitHub.
dialog.report_confirm:
Create a sanitized log report and open a GitHub issue?

(Paths/emails are anonymized)
dialog.report_opened_body:
The issue form uses the official bug template.

1. In the browser: briefly fill in “Problem” and “Actual behavior”
2. Logs are already formatted — paste with Ctrl+V into “📸 Logs”

Report file: {name}
dialog.install_reconfirm:
“{name}” is already set up.

Choose source/target again and run installation?
(Wine prefix stays; portable can be copied to a new target folder.)
dialog.repair_wiso:
Repair runs validate.sh and fills in what’s missing:
• Portable root / launch script
• vcrun2019, gdiplus, dotnet48 (Wine Mono), win10

Wine windows may appear briefly — please click OK or Install.

Continue?
dialog.repair_default:
Repair runs validate.sh and fixes:
• Native MSXML
• Fonts (ClearType/Segoe UI)
• Proton-GE graphics DLLs
• Desktop icon (only if already created)

Continue?
dialog.shortcuts_body:
Create “{name}” in the application/start menu and on the Desktop?

The icon comes from the recipe.

No / later: anytime under More → “Add or update shortcuts…”.
dialog.shortcuts_created:
Start-menu and desktop shortcuts created.

Create or refresh again (e.g. after deleting): More → “Add or update shortcuts…”.
dialog.shortcuts_failed: Could not create shortcuts. Check the log.
dialog.shortcuts_later: Add shortcuts later: More → Add or update shortcuts…
dialog.launch_already: “{name}” was already running (possibly hidden) — Quit, then Launch again
dialog.launch_tips_wiso:
Rezeptor → WISO → Repair (sets wined3d + Qt launch fix).
First start can take 10–20 s — check the Log tab.
Linux internet stays active; only one WISO Qt plugin is disabled.
dialog.launch_tips_default: Quit → Launch again, or Repair. Check the Log tab.

deps.title: Check system
deps.intro: Host tools Rezeptor needs for downloads, archives, and Wine.
deps.intro_first: Welcome — a quick check that important tools are present. You can install recommended missing packages.
deps.why_winetricks: Extra components (often already in the runtime)
deps.immutable_only: No one-click install on this system — copy the command and run it in a writable environment.
deps.install_tip: Install missing packages via the package manager (pkexec)
deps.no_pkexec: pkexec missing — copy the command and run it with sudo in a terminal.
deps.unsupported: Package manager not detected — copy the command and install manually.

source.title: Choose source
source.label: Source
source.clear_tip: Clear the field — then close with OK or Cancel
source.portable_ph: Target folder for the portable version
source.data_root_ph: Target folder for prefix and app data
source.steam_auto_hint: Target is detected from Steam (AppID) — editable.
source.folder_tip: Folder with the software (portable, game folder, offline-installer folder)
source.archive_tip: Archive; for multipart pick the first file (.001 / .part01). Passwords: global list
source.target_tip: Target folder (portable/data/game) — separate from Rezeptor install data; may be new
source.passwords_tip: Same global list as Settings → Archive passwords.
source.version_none: No version guarantee for this recipe.
source.version_unknown: Tested & guaranteed: {guaranteed} — source version not detected (may differ).
source.passwords_hint: Same as Settings → Archive passwords. One line = one password.
source.password_ask_body: “{name}” is protected. Enter the password — it will be saved to the global list.
source.password_wrong: Wrong password — try again or cancel.
source.need_source: Please choose a source (folder or archive).
source.need_fix: A fix package is required for this recipe.
source.saved_ready: Source and target saved — click “Install” to continue.
source.cleared: Source/target cleared — install needs a source again.

overview.hint: Description and requirements for the selected recipe.

progress.live_placeholder: Technical extra output — steps appear only in the list above…

wizard.title: New recipe
wizard.intro: Creates a recipe folder from the template (new-recipe.sh), runs recipe-lint, and updates the manifest.
wizard.name: Display name
wizard.category_tip: Pick a suggestion or type a custom category
wizard.done: Recipe “{id}” created. Folder opened — edit recipe.yml.
wizard.lint_fail: Recipe created, but recipe-lint reported errors — please check.
wizard.err_id: Enter a valid recipe ID (e.g. my-app).
wizard.blocked:
Recipe development needs a Git clone of the repository (writable recipes/ folder).

AppImage/release builds are for running only.

Clone the repo, run ./setup.sh, then: Rezeptor → New recipe…

docs.intro: Build Rezeptor recipes — local files from the repository. Online version on GitHub (branch main).

catalog.title: Add recipe
catalog.intro: Load official and community recipes from the catalog (GitHub). Bundled recipes stay in the app.
catalog.foreign_warn: Third-party sources are not officially reviewed — security risk. Only add trusted repos.
catalog.foreign_warn_dialog: Save third-party source? Recipes from it are not reviewed by us and may be harmful.
catalog.foreign_confirm: Install from third-party “{repo}”? Not officially reviewed.
catalog.loaded_local: {n} recipe(s) local (GitHub catalog unreachable — e.g. private repo)
catalog.foreign_fail_local: Third-party source failed ({err}) — showing {n} local recipe(s)

recipe_remove.title: Remove recipe definition
recipe_remove.confirm:
Delete folder “{path}”?

This only removes recipe files in the repo — not install data under ~/.local/share/wine-software/.

Bundled official recipes cannot be removed this way.
recipe_remove.blocked_official: “{id}” is an official recipe and cannot be removed here.

hidden.title: Hidden recipes
hidden.intro: Hidden recipes are absent from the sidebar — install data stays. Uninstall is separate.
